name: Golden Predator Mining Corp.
description: Golden Predator Mining Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration and development company focused on advancing its gold projects in the Yukon, Canada. The company's flagship asset is the 3-Aces Gold Project, a high-grade gold project located in southeastern Yukon. Golden Predator is committed to creating value for its shareholders through active exploration, development, and strategic partnerships, while maintaining high standards of environmental stewardship and community engagement.
